title: Built for Vera Rubin, NVIDIA Spectrum-6 Arrives in Gigascale AI Factories
excerpt: Next-generation NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet connects hundreds of thousands of GPUs with the performance, resilience and efficiency needed for gigascale AI, with AI infrastructure leaders already adopting.
content_html:
AI has entered the gigascale era.

The world’s most advanced AI factories are bringing together hundreds of thousands of GPUs and CPUs to train frontier models, power agentic AI and generate intelligence at unprecedented scale. At this level, networking becomes a critical computing power multiplier in driving token generation.

Marking a networking milestone, NVIDIA Spectrum-6 — a 102.4-terabit-per-second Ethernet switch system delivering 2x the capacity of previous-generation systems and built as part of the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform — is arriving across the world’s gigascale AI factories.

Spectrum-6 anchors the next generation of the NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet platform, delivering the bandwidth, scale and intelligence needed to operate an AI factory as one end-to-end computing system.

Leading AI Builders Move First

The world’s leading AI infrastructure builders — including CoreWeave, Microsoft, Nebius, SpaceXAI and Tesla — will be among the first to bring in Spectrum-6 to accelerate their AI factories.

For cloud providers, Spectrum-6 means more compute capacity can operate as a unified, high-performance resource, helping customers train models and deploy inference services faster.

“CoreWeave is built for the most demanding AI workloads, and networking is central to delivering that performance at scale,” said Min Jun, director of product for networking at CoreWeave. “Bringing NVIDIA Spectrum-6 and liquid-cooled Spectrum-X Ethernet infrastructure into our AI factories will help us deliver the bandwidth, resilience and efficiency customers need to train frontier models and deploy inference faster.”

“At gigascale, performance comes down to coordination: keeping every GPU in lockstep so one slow link doesn’t stall an entire job,” said Laurelle Roseman, vice president of global partnerships at Nebius. “That’s what NVIDIA Spectrum-6 goes after, and why we brought it in early — a fabric that stays fast and resilient as our customers’ most demanding workloads scale.”

For AI pioneers building their own infrastructure, Spectrum-6 means more GPUs working in lockstep, higher utilization during demanding collective operations and greater resilience for long-running jobs.

Across use cases, the outcome is faster time to results and better economics at extraordinary scale.

CoreWeave, Microsoft and Nebius will be among the first providers to deploy NVIDIA Vera Rubin-based infrastructure with Spectrum-6, extending access to the platform across a broad community of developers, startups and enterprises.

AI Performance Is a Network Problem

Peak GPU performance alone no longer predicts the performance of an AI factory.

Large-scale training and inference workloads depend on thousands of accelerators exchanging data continuously. Collective communications are the fundamental operations that synchronize work across GPUs and generate intense east-west traffic, often with many systems transmitting simultaneously.

Ethernet was designed primarily for enterprise applications and north-south traffic moving between users, servers and storage. It wasn’t created for the synchronized, collective-heavy communication patterns of gigascale AI.

Spectrum-X Ethernet changes that. Purpose-built for AI, it transforms Ethernet into a high-performance scale-out fabric engineered to keep every GPU fed with data.

The Next Generation of Spectrum-X Ethernet

The Spectrum-6 switch chip combines with the NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNIC to form the next generation of Spectrum-X Ethernet, and is engineered as part of NVIDIA Vera Rubin, bringing together the NVIDIA Vera CPU, Rubin GPU, NVLink 6 Switch, ConnectX-9 SuperNIC, BlueField-4 DPU and Spectrum-6 Ethernet switch. 

Spectrum-6 supports both pluggable and co-packaged optics form factors. In addition, Spectrum-6 offerings support liquid cooling, enabling a comprehensive, end-to-end cooling approach for the entire AI factory while increasing network power efficiency. 

Unlike off-the-shelf Ethernet, the NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet networking platform for AI factory scale-out combines intelligent switches, NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNICs and full-stack networking software, all engineered together for AI. The platform’s advanced features continuously optimize how traffic moves through the fabric.

In addition, NVIDIA Spectrum-X technology intelligently balances traffic across available paths, rapidly bypasses failures and precisely recovers when data traveling across a network fails to reach its destination. Plus, support for open network operating systems and a choice of RDMA transport models gives AI builders flexibility without compromising performance. 

Spectrum-X Ethernet is inherent to NVIDIA’s vertically integrated, horizontally open approach: codesigning silicon, systems and software across the full computing platform while supporting standard Ethernet, open network operating systems, open protocols and a broad ecosystem of cloud providers, system makers and infrastructure partners. Instead of needing to assemble a collection of parts and optimize them afterward, customers gain a complete AI factory platform designed to deliver the fastest time to train and the lowest cost per token.

Demonstrating this approach, Spectrum-X Ethernet delivers up to 1.6x higher AI networking performance than off-the-shelf Ethernet and sustains up to 95% network efficiency across deployments exceeding 100,000 GPUs. 

Hardware-accelerated Spectrum-X multiplane topologies reduce the number of switches required for data centers by 1.7x to further accelerate network efficiency. Further layering on the benefits achieved via Spectrum-X Ethernet Photonics, including 5x higher power efficiency and 10x improved mean time between incidents, network fabric enhancements continue to deliver workload accelerations beyond component-level optimization. 

Learn more about the NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet platform.

blocks.html_en: “CoreWeave is built for the most demanding AI workloads, and networking is central to delivering that performance at scale,” said Min Jun, director of product for networking at CoreWeave. “Bringing NVIDIA Spectrum-6 and liquid-cooled Spectrum-X Ethernet infrastructure into our AI factories will help us deliver the bandwidth, resilience and efficiency customers need to train frontier models and deploy inference faster.”

sentences.en: “CoreWeave is built for the most demanding AI workloads, and networking is central to delivering that performance at scale,” said Min Jun, director of product for networking at CoreWeave.
sentences.zh: CoreWeave 网络产品总监 Min Jun 表示：“CoreWeave 专为要求最苛刻的人工智能工作负载而构建，而网络对于大规模提供这种性能至关重要。”

sentences.en: “Bringing NVIDIA Spectrum-6 and liquid-cooled Spectrum-X Ethernet infrastructure into our AI factories will help us deliver the bandwidth, resilience and efficiency customers need to train frontier models and deploy inference faster.”
sentences.zh: “将 NVIDIA Spectrum-6 和液冷 Spectrum-X 以太网基础设施引入我们的 AI 工厂将有助于我们提供客户训练前沿模型和更快部署推理所需的带宽、弹性和效率。”

blocks.html_en: “At gigascale, performance comes down to coordination: keeping every GPU in lockstep so one slow link doesn’t stall an entire job,” said Laurelle Roseman, vice president of global partnerships at Nebius. “That’s what NVIDIA Spectrum-6 goes after, and why we brought it in early — a fabric that stays fast and resilient as our customers’ most demanding workloads scale.”

sentences.zh: Nebius 全球合作副总裁 Laurelle Roseman 表示：“在千兆级计算中，性能取决于协调：让每个 GPU 保持同步，这样一个缓慢的链接就不会阻碍整个工作。”

sentences.en: “That’s what NVIDIA Spectrum-6 goes after, and why we brought it in early — a fabric that stays fast and resilient as our customers’ most demanding workloads scale.”
sentences.zh: “这就是 NVIDIA Spectrum-6 所追求的目标，也是我们尽早引入它的原因——一种能够在客户最苛刻的工作负载扩展时保持快速和弹性的结构。”

blocks.html_en: For AI pioneers building their own infrastructure, Spectrum-6 means more GPUs working in lockstep, higher utilization during demanding collective operations and greater resilience for long-running jobs.

sentences.en: For AI pioneers building their own infrastructure, Spectrum-6 means more GPUs working in lockstep, higher utilization during demanding collective operations and greater resilience for long-running jobs.
sentences.zh: 对于构建自己的基础设施的 AI 先驱者来说，Spectrum-6 意味着更多的 GPU 同步工作、在要求较高的集体操作期间更高的利用率以及对长时间运行的作业具有更大的弹性。

blocks.html_en: Across use cases, the outcome is faster time to results and better economics at extraordinary scale.

sentences.en: Across use cases, the outcome is faster time to results and better economics at extraordinary scale.
sentences.zh: 在各个用例中，结果是更快地获得结果，并在非凡的规模上获得更好的经济效益。

blocks.html_en: CoreWeave, Microsoft and Nebius will be among the first providers to deploy NVIDIA Vera Rubin-based infrastructure with Spectrum-6, extending access to the platform across a broad community of developers, startups and enterprises.

sentences.zh: CoreWeave、微软和 Nebius 将成为首批通过 Spectrum-6 部署基于 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 的基础设施的提供商之一，从而将平台的访问扩展至更广泛的开发者、初创公司和企业社区。

sentences.en: AI Performance Is a Network Problem
sentences.zh: 人工智能性能是一个网络问题

Collective communications are the fundamental operations that synchronize work across GPUs and generate intense east-west traffic, often with many systems transmitting simultaneously.

sentences.en: Large-scale training and inference workloads depend on thousands of accelerators exchanging data continuously.
sentences.zh: 大规模训练和推理工作负载依赖于数千个不断交换数据的加速器。

sentences.en: Collective communications are the fundamental operations that synchronize work across GPUs and generate intense east-west traffic, often with many systems transmitting simultaneously.
sentences.zh: 集体通信是跨 GPU 同步工作并产生密集的东西向流量的基本操作，通常许多系统同时进行传输。

blocks.html_en: Ethernet was designed primarily for enterprise applications and north-south traffic moving between users, servers and storage. It wasn’t created for the synchronized, collective-heavy communication patterns of gigascale AI.

sentences.en: Ethernet was designed primarily for enterprise applications and north-south traffic moving between users, servers and storage.
sentences.zh: 以太网主要是为企业应用程序以及用户、服务器和存储之间移动的南北流量而设计的。

sentences.en: It wasn’t created for the synchronized, collective-heavy communication patterns of gigascale AI.
sentences.zh: 它并不是为千兆级人工智能的同步、集体性强的通信模式而创建的。

blocks.html_en: Spectrum-X Ethernet changes that. Purpose-built for AI, it transforms Ethernet into a high-performance scale-out fabric engineered to keep every GPU fed with data.

sentences.en: Spectrum-X Ethernet changes that.
sentences.zh: Spectrum-X 以太网改变了这一点。

sentences.en: Purpose-built for AI, it transforms Ethernet into a high-performance scale-out fabric engineered to keep every GPU fed with data.
sentences.zh: 它专为人工智能而设计，将以太网转变为高性能横向扩展结构，旨在为每个 GPU 提供数据。

blocks.html_en: The Next Generation of Spectrum-X Ethernet

sentences.en: The Next Generation of Spectrum-X Ethernet
sentences.zh: 下一代 Spectrum-X 以太网

blocks.html_en: The Spectrum-6 switch chip combines with the NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNIC to form the next generation of Spectrum-X Ethernet, and is engineered as part of NVIDIA Vera Rubin, bringing together the NVIDIA Vera CPU, Rubin GPU, NVLink 6 Switch, ConnectX-9 SuperNIC, BlueField-4 DPU and Spectrum-6 Ethernet switch.

sentences.en: The Spectrum-6 switch chip combines with the NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNIC to form the next generation of Spectrum-X Ethernet, and is engineered as part of NVIDIA Vera Rubin, bringing together the NVIDIA Vera CPU, Rubin GPU, NVLink 6 Switch, ConnectX-9 SuperNIC, BlueField-4 DPU and Spectrum-6 Ethernet switch.
sentences.zh: Spectrum-6 交换机芯片与 NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNIC 相结合，形成下一代 Spectrum-X 以太网，并作为 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 的一部分进行设计，汇集了 NVIDIA Vera CPU、Rubin GPU、NVLink 6 交换机、ConnectX-9 SuperNIC、BlueField-4 DPU 和 Spectrum-6 以太网交换机。

blocks.html_en: Spectrum-6 supports both pluggable and co-packaged optics form factors. In addition, Spectrum-6 offerings support liquid cooling, enabling a comprehensive, end-to-end cooling approach for the entire AI factory while increasing network power efficiency.

sentences.en: Spectrum-6 supports both pluggable and co-packaged optics form factors.
sentences.zh: Spectrum-6 支持可插拔和共同封装的光学器件外形尺寸。

sentences.en: In addition, Spectrum-6 offerings support liquid cooling, enabling a comprehensive, end-to-end cooling approach for the entire AI factory while increasing network power efficiency.
sentences.zh: 此外，Spectrum-6 产品支持液体冷却，为整个人工智能工厂提供全面的端到端冷却方法，同时提高网络能效。

blocks.html_en: Unlike off-the-shelf Ethernet, the NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet networking platform for AI factory scale-out combines intelligent switches, NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNICs and full-stack networking software, all engineered together for AI. The platform’s advanced features continuously optimize how traffic moves through the fabric.

sentences.en: Unlike off-the-shelf Ethernet, the NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet networking platform for AI factory scale-out combines intelligent switches, NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNICs and full-stack networking software, all engineered together for AI.
sentences.zh: 与现成的以太网不同，用于 AI 工厂横向扩展的 NVIDIA Spectrum-X 以太网网络平台结合了智能交换机、NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNIC 和全栈网络软件，所有这些都针对 AI 进行了设计。

sentences.en: The platform’s advanced features continuously optimize how traffic moves through the fabric.
sentences.zh: 该平台的先进功能不断优化流量在结构中的移动方式。

blocks.html_en: In addition, NVIDIA Spectrum-X technology intelligently balances traffic across available paths, rapidly bypasses failures and precisely recovers when data traveling across a network fails to reach its destination. Plus, support for open network operating systems and a choice of RDMA transport models gives AI builders flexibility without compromising performance.

sentences.en: In addition, NVIDIA Spectrum-X technology intelligently balances traffic across available paths, rapidly bypasses failures and precisely recovers when data traveling across a network fails to reach its destination.
sentences.zh: 此外，NVIDIA Spectrum-X 技术可以智能地平衡可用路径上的流量，快速绕过故障，并在网络中传输的数据无法到达目的地时精确恢复。

sentences.en: Plus, support for open network operating systems and a choice of RDMA transport models gives AI builders flexibility without compromising performance.
sentences.zh: 此外，对开放网络操作系统的支持和 RDMA 传输模型的选择为 AI 构建者提供了灵活性，同时又不影响性能。

blocks.html_en: Spectrum-X Ethernet is inherent to NVIDIA’s vertically integrated, horizontally open approach: codesigning silicon, systems and software across the full computing platform while supporting standard Ethernet, open network operating systems, open protocols and a broad ecosystem of cloud providers, system makers and infrastructure partners. Instead of needing to assemble a collection of parts and optimize them afterward, customers gain a complete AI factory platform designed to deliver the fastest time to train and the lowest cost per token.

sentences.en: Spectrum-X Ethernet is inherent to NVIDIA’s vertically integrated, horizontally open approach: codesigning silicon, systems and software across the full computing platform while supporting standard Ethernet, open network operating systems, open protocols and a broad ecosystem of cloud providers, system makers and infrastructure partners.
sentences.zh: Spectrum-X 以太网是 NVIDIA 垂直集成、水平开放方法所固有的：在整个计算平台上共同设计芯片、系统和软件，同时支持标准以太网、开放网络操作系统、开放协议以及由云提供商、系统制造商和基础设施合作伙伴组成的广泛生态系统。

sentences.en: Instead of needing to assemble a collection of parts and optimize them afterward, customers gain a complete AI factory platform designed to deliver the fastest time to train and the lowest cost per token.
sentences.zh: 客户无需组装一系列零件并随后对其进行优化，而是获得了一个完整的人工智能工厂平台，该平台旨在提供最快的训练时间和最低的每个代币成本。

blocks.html_en: Demonstrating this approach, Spectrum-X Ethernet delivers up to 1.6x higher AI networking performance than off-the-shelf Ethernet and sustains up to 95% network efficiency across deployments exceeding 100,000 GPUs.

sentences.en: Demonstrating this approach, Spectrum-X Ethernet delivers up to 1.6x higher AI networking performance than off-the-shelf Ethernet and sustains up to 95% network efficiency across deployments exceeding 100,000 GPUs.
sentences.zh: Spectrum-X 以太网展示了这种方法，其 AI 网络性能比现成的以太网高出 1.6 倍，并在超过 100,000 个 GPU 的部署中保持高达 95% 的网络效率。

blocks.html_en: Hardware-accelerated Spectrum-X multiplane topologies reduce the number of switches required for data centers by 1.7x to further accelerate network efficiency. Further layering on the benefits achieved via Spectrum-X Ethernet Photonics, including 5x higher power efficiency and 10x improved mean time between incidents, network fabric enhancements continue to deliver workload accelerations beyond component-level optimization.

sentences.en: Hardware-accelerated Spectrum-X multiplane topologies reduce the number of switches required for data centers by 1.7x to further accelerate network efficiency.
sentences.zh: 硬件加速的 Spectrum-X 多平面拓扑将数据中心所需的交换机数量减少了 1.7 倍，进一步提高了网络效率。

sentences.en: Further layering on the benefits achieved via Spectrum-X Ethernet Photonics, including 5x higher power efficiency and 10x improved mean time between incidents, network fabric enhancements continue to deliver workload accelerations beyond component-level optimization.
sentences.zh: 通过 Spectrum-X 以太网光子学实现的优势进一步分层，包括提高 5 倍的电源效率和缩短 10 倍的平均事件间隔时间，网络结构增强功能继续提供超越组件级优化的工作负载加速。

blocks.html_en: Learn more about the NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet platform.

sentences.en: Learn more about the NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet platform.
sentences.zh: 了解有关 NVIDIA Spectrum-X 以太网平台的更多信息。

content_html_zh:
人工智能已进入千兆时代。

世界上最先进的人工智能工厂正在汇集数十万个 GPU 和 CPU，以训练前沿模型、驱动人工智能并以前所未有的规模生成智能。 在这个层面上，网络成为推动代币生成的关键计算能力倍增器。

NVIDIA Spectrum-6 是一个每秒 102.4 太比特的以太网交换机系统，作为 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 平台的一部分而构建，其容量是上一代系统的 2 倍，标志着网络里程碑，即将进入全球千兆级 AI 工厂。

Spectrum-6 是下一代 NVIDIA Spectrum-X 以太网平台的基础，提供将人工智能工厂作为一个端到端计算系统运营所需的带宽、规模和智能。

领先的人工智能构建者先行一步

全球领先的人工智能基础设施建设者——包括 CoreWeave、微软、Nebius、SpaceXAI 和特斯拉——将成为首批引入 Spectrum-6 来加速其人工智能工厂的公司之一。

对于云提供商而言，Spectrum-6 意味着更多的计算能力可以作为统一的高性能资源运行，帮助客户更快地训练模型和部署推理服务。

CoreWeave 网络产品总监 Min Jun 表示：“CoreWeave 专为要求最苛刻的人工智能工作负载而构建，而网络对于大规模提供这种性能至关重要。” “将 NVIDIA Spectrum-6 和液冷 Spectrum-X 以太网基础设施引入我们的 AI 工厂将有助于我们提供客户训练前沿模型和更快部署推理所需的带宽、弹性和效率。”

Nebius 全球合作副总裁 Laurelle Roseman 表示：“在千兆级计算中，性能取决于协调：让每个 GPU 保持同步，这样一个缓慢的链接就不会阻碍整个工作。” “这就是 NVIDIA Spectrum-6 所追求的目标，也是我们尽早引入它的原因——一种能够在客户最苛刻的工作负载扩展时保持快速和弹性的结构。”

对于构建自己的基础设施的 AI 先驱者来说，Spectrum-6 意味着更多的 GPU 同步工作、在要求较高的集体操作期间更高的利用率以及对长时间运行的作业具有更大的弹性。

在各个用例中，结果是更快地获得结果，并在非凡的规模上获得更好的经济效益。

CoreWeave、微软和 Nebius 将成为首批通过 Spectrum-6 部署基于 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 的基础设施的提供商之一，从而将平台的访问扩展至更广泛的开发者、初创公司和企业社区。

人工智能性能是一个网络问题

GPU 峰值性能不再单独预测 AI 工厂的性能。

大规模训练和推理工作负载依赖于数千个不断交换数据的加速器。 集体通信是跨 GPU 同步工作并产生密集的东西向流量的基本操作，通常许多系统同时进行传输。

以太网主要是为企业应用程序以及用户、服务器和存储之间移动的南北流量而设计的。 它并不是为千兆级人工智能的同步、集体性强的通信模式而创建的。

Spectrum-X 以太网改变了这一点。 它专为人工智能而设计，将以太网转变为高性能横向扩展结构，旨在为每个 GPU 提供数据。

下一代 Spectrum-X 以太网

Spectrum-6 交换机芯片与 NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNIC 相结合，形成下一代 Spectrum-X 以太网，并作为 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 的一部分进行设计，汇集了 NVIDIA Vera CPU、Rubin GPU、NVLink 6 交换机、ConnectX-9 SuperNIC、BlueField-4 DPU 和 Spectrum-6 以太网交换机。

Spectrum-6 支持可插拔和共同封装的光学器件外形尺寸。 此外，Spectrum-6 产品支持液体冷却，为整个人工智能工厂提供全面的端到端冷却方法，同时提高网络能效。

与现成的以太网不同，用于 AI 工厂横向扩展的 NVIDIA Spectrum-X 以太网网络平台结合了智能交换机、NVIDIA ConnectX-9 SuperNIC 和全栈网络软件，所有这些都针对 AI 进行了设计。 该平台的先进功能不断优化流量在结构中的移动方式。

此外，NVIDIA Spectrum-X 技术可以智能地平衡可用路径上的流量，快速绕过故障，并在网络中传输的数据无法到达目的地时精确恢复。 此外，对开放网络操作系统的支持和 RDMA 传输模型的选择为 AI 构建者提供了灵活性，同时又不影响性能。

Spectrum-X 以太网是 NVIDIA 垂直集成、水平开放方法所固有的：在整个计算平台上共同设计芯片、系统和软件，同时支持标准以太网、开放网络操作系统、开放协议以及由云提供商、系统制造商和基础设施合作伙伴组成的广泛生态系统。 客户无需组装一系列零件并随后对其进行优化，而是获得了一个完整的人工智能工厂平台，该平台旨在提供最快的训练时间和最低的每个代币成本。

Spectrum-X 以太网展示了这种方法，其 AI 网络性能比现成的以太网高出 1.6 倍，并在超过 100,000 个 GPU 的部署中保持高达 95% 的网络效率。

硬件加速的 Spectrum-X 多平面拓扑将数据中心所需的交换机数量减少了 1.7 倍，进一步提高了网络效率。 通过 Spectrum-X 以太网光子学实现的优势进一步分层，包括提高 5 倍的电源效率和缩短 10 倍的平均事件间隔时间，网络结构增强功能继续提供超越组件级优化的工作负载加速。
